body:
## [3.33.0] - 2026-06-16

### Features

- add functionality to remove deleted voucher and gift card payments from providers
- enhance payment split dialog to support methodId for pending payments and add delete functionality
- refine payment handling in gift card activation and improve receipt formatting
- add localization for return change payment and update gift card payment error handling
- enhance zero-price product addition with return mode handling and salesperson selection

### Other Changes

- clean up gift card activation dialog input handling and remove decimal support
